= weaveback-agent-core change_plan

[source,rust]
----
// <[@file weaveback-agent-core/src/change_plan.rs]>=
// weaveback-agent-core/src/change_plan.rs
// I'd Really Rather You Didn't edit this generated file.

use serde::{Deserialize, Serialize};

#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
pub struct ChangePlan {
    pub plan_id: String,
    pub goal: String,
    pub constraints: Vec<String>,
    pub edits: Vec<PlannedEdit>,
}

#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
pub struct PlannedEdit {
    pub edit_id: String,
    pub rationale: String,
    pub target: ChangeTarget,
    pub new_src_lines: Vec<String>,
    pub anchor: OutputAnchor,
}

#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
pub struct ChangeTarget {
    pub src_file: String,
    pub src_line: usize,
    pub src_line_end: usize,
}

#[derive(Debug, Clone, Serialize, Deserialize)]
pub struct OutputAnchor {
    pub out_file: String,
    pub out_line: u32,
    pub expected_output: String,
}
